name: the composite dispatch reports incomplete (not_enforced) and exit 3 when an optional tool is absent
command: printf 'resource "x" "y" {}\n' > main.tf && RUN_TOOL_FORCE_ABSENT=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-dispatch.sh" --file main.tf --tools checkov 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 3 ] && grep -q 'status=incomplete' e.txt && echo dispatch-incomplete 1>&2
